CustomField.description: This is used in Sharing Rules to control record visibility. It is part of the data separation project. At record creation it defaults to the value of the Entity__c field on the User creating the record. It also gets set via several record-triggered Flows from related Objects.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is used in Sharing Rules to control record visibility. It is part of the data separation project. At record creation it defaults to the value of the Entity__c field on the User creating the record. It also gets set via several record-triggered Flows from related Objects.
CustomField.label: Data Owner
